rules: CRITICAL: All internal imports MUST use the '.js' extension for ESM compatibility.
CRITICAL: Node.js built-in modules MUST use the 'node:' prefix.
CRITICAL: All public functions and methods MUST have explicit return types.
PERFORMANCE: Independent tasks MUST use 'Promise.all' for parallel execution.
CLEAN CODE: Error handling MUST use type guards instead of casting to 'any'.
REACT: useEffect/useMemo/useCallback dependency arrays MUST list every value read inside.
